sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The history search didn't find any early frames of level 3. Let me look at the transitions to find the initial state of level 3.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the first frame of level 3
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    if h.frame.level == 3:
        seg = h.frame.segmentation['nodes']
        print(f"History[{i}], Step {h.frame.step}:")
        for n in seg:
            if n['color'] == 'W':
                b = n['boundary']
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"  W: px={n['pixels']}, r={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, c={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        for n in seg:
            if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'p', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] < 10:
                b = n['boundary']
                rows = [p[0] for p in b]
                cols = [p[1] for p in b]
                print(f"  {n['color']}: px={n['pixels']}, r={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, c={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
